relationships.description: Sorghum lines were evaluated for different CMS systems
Sorghum is the host plant for the shoot fly
The shoot fly causes deadhearts in sorghum plants
CMS systems influence the reaction to shoot fly infestation
CMS systems affect the time to 50% flowering
CMS systems affect the plant height
CMS systems affect the agronomic desirability of the lines
A1 is a specific CMS background
A2 is a specific CMS background
A3 is a specific CMS background
A4G1 is a specific CMS background
A4M is a specific CMS background
A4VzM is a specific CMS background
A4M showed lower deadheart incidence compared to other CMS systems
Maintainer lines showed lower deadheart incidence than CMS lines
Andhra Pradesh is located in India
Sorghum experiment was conducted in Andhra Pradesh
Experiment conducted during the wet season
Experiment conducted during the post-wet season
